description: A connector is pure data: it lines the columns of a common project/ERP job export up with the signage pack's fields. Rename the left side to match your export's headers.

value_hints.contract: strip $ and commas — Aris reads money either way
value_hints.margin_pct: a number like 24.8, not the string '24.8%'

note: No code here — a connector is a column-to-field map. Your job data never leaves your control except as the records you choose to load.
